who: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual payroll processing causes compliance issues. We provide a payroll data aggregator instead of manual payroll processing with spreadsheets.
problem: Ensuring compliance and accuracy in payroll processing
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Indie Hackers posts on payroll processing challenges
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Community forums sharing payroll tools and tips
try_it: Let users try data validation and compliance reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
